---
title: "Section 7: Page Design Showcase"
id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Page 1 - Overview Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp01.qmd)

- [Page 2 - Concept Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp02.qmd)

- [Page 3 - Worked Example](mod001-se01-sec07-sp03.qmd)

- [Page 4 - Application Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp04.qmd)

- [Page 5 - Discussion Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp05.qmd)

- [Page 6 - Interactive Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp06.qmd)

- [Page 7 - Summary Page](mod001-se01-sec07-sp07.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../06-mixed-template-demonstration/mod001-se01-sec06-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 7 - Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Overview Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
